task_completion.description: Place two XOR gates on the EdrawMax canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two distinct XOR gate symbols are visible on the drawing canvas.

task_completion.description: Place two AND gates and one OR gate on the EdrawMax canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two distinct AND gate symbols and one OR gate symbol are visible on the drawing canvas.

task_completion.description: Connect the gates with lines to form a 1-bit Full Adder circuit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Connector lines link the inputs to the gates and the gates to each other, matching a full adder topology (e.g., inputs to XOR and AND gates, outputs of AND gates to the OR gate).
Text boxes containing 'A', 'B', 'Cin' are placed near the input lines, and 'Sum', 'Cout' are placed near the final output lines of the circuit.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as an .eddx file to /home/ga/Diagrams/full_adder_circuit.eddx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the path /home/ga/Diagrams/ and filename full_adder_circuit.eddx, or the EdrawMax title bar displays full_adder_circuit.eddx.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a PNG image to /home/ga/Diagrams/full_adder_circuit.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog shows the PNG format and the path /home/ga/Diagrams/full_adder_circuit.png, or a file manager shows the created .png file in the Diagrams folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the circuit.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the EdrawMax application window open with active interaction (e.g., dragging shapes, using menus), rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The circuit is built using individual shape components rather than a single pasted image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Logic gates appear as individual vector shapes, potentially with selection handles, connection points, or grid snapping visible, rather than a single flat image pasted from a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in save and export functions.
integrity.visual_evidence: File menus or Save/Export dialog boxes within EdrawMax are visible, indicating the files were generated by the application itself.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output paths are exactly '/home/ga/Diagrams/full_adder_circuit.eddx' and '/home/ga/Diagrams/full_adder_circuit.png'. The circuit must contain at least 2 XOR gates, 2 AND gates, and 1 OR gate. The diagram must explicitly include the visual text labels: 'Sum', 'Cout', 'A', 'B', and 'Cin'.
